channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-17
item.description:
The scienceverse community has been abuzz with activity, particularly in the metacheck project. Recent efforts have focused on the `dev` branch, where several key merge requests have been incorporated, including the `jw_plumber_bibr_api`, `jw_bibr_read_passthrough`, `jw_grobid_text_fix`, and `jw_schema_sync_10_5` branches. These updates, outlined in pull requests #333, #332, #331, and #330, demonstrate the project's ongoing commitment to improvement and synchronization. The successful merging of these branches highlights the collaborative spirit of the community and sets the stage for further progress. As metacheck continues to evolve, its connections to other scienceverse projects will likely become even more significant, enabling new possibilities for research and innovation. Overall, the community can celebrate the tangible progress being made and look forward to the exciting developments on the horizon.

34 commits across 3 active repositories this week.

New releases: oddpub v7.3.0

Dormant repos revived: statcheck

Most active:

regcheck18 commits
oddpub9 commits
metacheck7 commits

item.title: metacheck: 4 commits today
item.description:
scienceverse/metacheck

The `dev` branch was the focus of recent work, with multiple merge requests incorporated. The `jw_plumber_bibr_api` branch was merged, as described in pull request #333. The `jw_bibr_read_passthrough` branch was also merged, as outlined in pull request #332. Additionally, the `jw_grobid_text_fix` branch was merged, addressing a specific text fix, as noted in pull request #331. The `jw_schema_sync_10_5` branch was merged as well, related to schema synchronization, as seen in pull request #330.

4 commit(s) today:

  • 1c49ec7 [dev] Merge pull request #333 from scienceverse/jw_plumber_bibr_api — Lisa DeBruine
  • f9da25f [dev] Merge pull request #332 from scienceverse/jw_bibr_read_passthrough — Lisa DeBruine
  • 0736a45 [dev] Merge pull request #331 from scienceverse/jw_grobid_text_fix — Lisa DeBruine
  • 9c2d675 [dev] Merge pull request #330 from scienceverse/jw_schema_sync_10_5 — Lisa DeBruine

View all commits →

item.title: statcheck: activity update
item.description:
MicheleNuijten/statcheck

The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch was worked on, where a merge was performed, specifically merging the `feature-non-apa-newer` branch from the `https://github.com/MicheleNuijten/statcheck` repository into itself. The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch also received "admin updates", as per the commit message, which suggests changes to administrative aspects of the repository. No other branches were mentioned in the provided commits, indicating that all recent work was focused on `feature-non-apa-newer`. The merge commit combined changes from the remote `feature-non-apa-newer` branch into the local version, but the specifics of these changes are not detailed in the provided commit messages. The nature and extent of the "admin updates" are also not elaborated upon in the commit messages.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →

item.title: oddpub: 5 commits today
item.description:
quest-bih/oddpub

The `main` branch was the focus of the recent work, with multiple commits made to it. The Zenodo badge was updated, as indicated by the commit message "ontogenerator: Updated Zenodo badge", and also referenced in another commit as "ontogenerator: zenodo badge". The README file underwent a "touchup", according to the commit message "ontogenerator: README touchup", and the version number was incremented to 7.3.0 with the commit "ontogenerator: Increment version number to 7.3.0". Additionally, the documentation was updated and keywords were cleaned up, as stated in the commit "ontogenerator: Documentation update, keyword cleanup".

5 commit(s) today:

  • e1ca58e [main] Updated Zenodo badge — ontogenerator
  • 441d354 [main] README touchup — ontogenerator
  • 998a877 [main] Increment version number to 7.3.0 — ontogenerator
  • 95643d5 [main] zenodo badge — ontogenerator
  • 7c98de1 [main] Documentation update, keyword cleanup — ontogenerator

New release: v7.3.0 — Toba

View all commits →
